LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_a.label: Kakistos Wear A
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_a.description: A jacket favored by Outerms. Perhaps because of their tastes, it gives off a distinctly decadent air.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_b.label: Kakistos Wear B
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_b.description: A jacket favored by Outerms. Perhaps because of their tastes, it gives off a distinctly decadent air.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_c.label: Kakistos Wear C
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_c.description: A jacket favored by Outerms. Perhaps because of their tastes, it gives off a distinctly decadent air.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_d.label: Kakistos Wear D
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_d.description: A jacket favored by Outerms. Perhaps because of their tastes, it gives off a distinctly decadent air.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_e.label: Kakistos Wear E
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_e.description: A jacket favored by Outerms. Perhaps because of their tastes, it gives off a distinctly decadent air.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_Suit_a.label: Kakistos Suit
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_Suit_a.description: A jacket favored by Outerms. Even for a race that likes provocative clothing, higher-ranking members still seem to care about appearances.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_Armor_a.label: Diaphthora Armor
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_T_Armor_a.description: Armor made exclusively for Outerms. Its built-in automatic correction systems allow for highly precise movement.
